data.title: BBHW Supports DEA Scheduling of 7-OH and Three Related Drugs as an Important Step in Removing Dangerous Synthetic Products from the Market
data.description: In a recent announcement, the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) revealed that 7-hydroxymitragynine (7-OH) along with pseudoindoxyl, MGM15, and MGM16 are now listed under Schedule I of the Controlled Substances Act. This decision by the DEA aims to harmonize regulation with scientific understanding, a stance backed by Botanicals for Better Health and Wellness (BBHW). The move to schedule these substances signifies a crucial step towards reinforcing safety measures within the U.S. The inclusion of 7-OH and the three related synthetic drugs underscores the government's commitment to addressing substance abuse concerns proactively.

data.title: First G-SIB, Standard Chartered, permits institutions to mint/redeem Circle's USDC, a pioneering move in the financial sector.
data.description: Standard Chartered has become the inaugural Global Systemically Important Bank permitted to facilitate the minting and redeeming of Circle's USDC stablecoin. This groundbreaking development marks a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency industry, with Standard Chartered paving the way for institutions to engage in USDC transactions. This move is expected to enhance liquidity and accessibility for USDC, a digital asset that boasts a market capitalization exceeding $30 billion.

data.title: A New Era for Hanuman Beverages: Expanding the Global Footprint Through World-Class Innovation and Cambodian Excellence.
data.description: Cambodian premium brewing company, Hanuman Beverages, made a significant international stride on July 2, 2026. The brand launched its products in four key overseas markets as part of its campaign "The Taste of Greatness." This move marks a pivotal moment in the company's expansion strategy.

data.title: First Merchants Corporation to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On July 2, 2026, First Merchants Corporation (Nasdaq: FRME) announced that it is set to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on July 22, 2026. Following this, the Corporation plans to conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. (ET) on July 23, 2026. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during the specified quarter.

data.title: EPR Fireworks Appoints Neriyah Oren as Vice President of Product
data.description: Oviedo, Florida - On July 2, 2026, EPR Fireworks, a recognized company offering advanced records management and operational software for Fire and EMS departments, revealed the appointment of Neriyah Oren as Vice President of Product. This move aims to enhance the company's leadership team and boost its product offerings.

data.title: GRM Information Management to Attend the 2026 NAGARA Annual Conference
data.description: GRM Information Management, the top privately owned records management entity in the United States, is set to present its diverse range of services at the NAGARA Conference in Philadelphia, PA, from July 21-24. Attendees at the NAGARA show can explore GRM’s offerings at booth #303, encompassing document storage, scanning, secure destruction, and digital records management solutions. Operating in 15 cities across the US, GRM is a key player in the industry.

data.title: Greenlight Guru achieves ISO 42001 certification for AI governance across medtech quality and clinical solutions
data.description: Greenlight Guru has recently obtained certification for AI governance in their eQMS and EDC products. This certification provides medical device companies with reliable evidence for audits and vendor qualification. The company, based in Indianapolis, achieved this certification on July 2, 2026. This ensures robust governance practices for their products and offers assurance to clients in the industry.

data.title: AIX Rosé and Playlister Present Sea, AIX & Sun: The Sound of a Provençal Summer
data.description: In conjunction with the beginning of summer on July 2, 2026, AIX Rosé and Playlister have collaboratively launched Sea, AIX & Sun. This unique curated playlist aims to encapsulate the essence of a Provençal summer, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in the vibrant energy of the region. The playlist is designed to evoke imagery of sun-soaked days, golden-hued evenings, and the laid-back ambiance characteristic of the South of France.

data.title: Google-Backed Glance Appoints Former Verizon Executive Ashim Sen to Accelerate Telecom Growth Across the Americas
data.description: Today, Glance, based in San Mateo, California, has appointed Ashim Sen, a former executive at Verizon, as the Vice President of Americas Growth & Revenue.

data.title: Circle K and AriZona Beverages Celebrate America’s 250th Birthday with Exclusive New Patriotic Punch
data.description: A limited-edition AriZona Sparkling Patriotic Punch has been introduced by Circle K and AriZona Beverages in Charlotte, North Carolina. This exclusive flavor, perfect for summer, is all-American and bold.

data.title: USA Today’s America 250 Series Features LP Building Solutions’ Role In American Homebuilding
data.description: LP Building Solutions, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has been recognized in USA Today's America 250 series for its significant contributions to American home construction. The company's innovative practices over the years have played a key role in shaping the industry.
